matches.rationale: Same Write action and new-UI-primitive target; the Japanese evidence explicitly requires checking packages/ui/index.tsx before creating a primitive.
Same Edit action and hardcoded-color target. The extraction is narrower than the gold rule because its pattern covers hex colors in TSX, JSX, and CSS, but partial coverage still matches.

Same Edit action and Studio keyboard-shortcut-handling target; both the key-event-listener pattern and evidence specifically prefer registered shortcuts over one-off listeners. The extraction does not fully encode discoverability or all possible listener forms.
Same Write action and Studio sub-component-file target; the Japanese evidence requires placing sub-components with their parent.
Same Write action and barrel re-export-file target. The extraction is narrower because it detects relative export-star barrels under apps/studio, but partial coverage still matches.
